title: ctenopteris kegeliana
intro: Ctenopteris kegeliana, also known as the New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and eastern Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenopteris kegeliana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
